title: UK/Spain: Agreement on the Free Pursuit of Gainful Occupation by Dependants of Members of Diplomatic Missions and Consular Offices [CS Spain No.1/2025]
body: "Published title: Agreement between the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Kingdom of Spain on the Free Pursuit of Gainful Occupation by Dependants of Members of Diplomatic Missions and Consular Offices. "
